suffix-adjective-to-token.label: Suffix random adjective
suffix-adjective-to-token.hintPrototype: When enabled, newly placed tokens move Foundry's random adjective to the end of the name. Requires the core adjective option.
suffix-adjective-to-token.hintPlaced: This flag is stored on the token, but it only affects newly created tokens that also use Foundry's core adjective option.
